description_long: This figure represents an adult pedestrian dressed in a futuristic, urban-inspired outfit. The individual wears a long, layered coat with wide sleeves, adorned with metallic and glowing accents, and a high, structured collar. The face is fully covered by a sleek, opaque visor, giving a high-tech, anonymous appearance. The hands are gloved, and the lower half features fitted shorts over leggings, with reinforced knee and shin guards. The footwear consists of open-toed, sandal-like shoes with thick soles, and the overall ensemble is accessorized with visible cables and tech elements integrated into the clothing. The figure's hair is styled in a spiked, voluminous fashion, adding to the modern, edgy look.
description: A futuristic adult pedestrian in a layered, high-tech coat with a visor-covered face, gloves, and open-toed sandals, accessorized with tech elements and spiked hair.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full outfit, visor, gloves, and layered coat with tech accents.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the spiked hairstyle, tech details on the sleeve, and profile of the visor.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back structure of the coat, visible cables, and tech accessories.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing sleeve details and the side profile of the footwear.
attribute_clothing_type: futuristic layered coat with wide sleeves, fitted shorts over leggings, gloves, and tech accessories
